purpose: Produce Seam S3: a pure buildReactionRumor function that constructs an unsigned NIP-25 kind-7 rumor with a canonical NIP-01 SHA-256 id, consumed by story-06 (group reactions) and story-07 (DM reactions).

public_api.name: buildReactionRumor
public_api.signature: function buildReactionRumor(params: { emoji: string; targetMessageId: string; targetMessageKind: number; targetAuthorPubkey?: string; selfPrivKeyHex: string; isRemoval?: boolean; }): UnsignedRumor
public_api.description: Returns an unsigned kind-7 rumor per D10 and NIP-25. content is the emoji glyph (or '-' for removal). Tags always include ['e', targetMessageId] and ['k', String(targetMessageKind)]. ['p', targetAuthorPubkey] is included iff targetAuthorPubkey is a non-empty string. For removal + non-empty emoji, adds ['emoji', emoji] tag. pubkey is derived from selfPrivKeyHex. id is the canonical NIP-01 SHA-256 hash. No sig field. Throws on empty emoji string.
